title: Approval
description: Payload for message_type=Approval. Sent by Commissioner → Overseer. Grants permission to begin EXECUTION. Overseer MUST NACK if constraints_confirmed or acceptance_tests_confirmed are not exactly true.

decision.description: 'approved' moves run to EXECUTION. 'hard_fail' terminates the run immediately (used only for contradictions, policy violations, or provably impossible goals).

commissioner_score.description: Final completeness score. Should be >= 80 for 'approved'; informational for 'hard_fail'.

rationale.description: Explanation of the decision. Must reference specific GoalSpec fields for hard_fail.

constraints_confirmed.description: Must be exactly true. Overseer MUST NACK if false or missing.

acceptance_tests_confirmed.description: Must be exactly true. Overseer MUST NACK if false or missing.

hard_fail_reason.description: Required if decision='hard_fail'. Explains exactly why the goal is impossible or violates policy.

approved_stack.description: Optional: Commissioner may narrow or confirm specific stack choices here.
